demo.name: Signal Gate
demo.boundary: Small local 2D Godot-plus evidence-native workflow demonstration; no Godot replacement, no production-ready engine/editor claim, no commercial release readiness, no native/mobile/console/store export, and no public deployment.

generatedStatePolicy: Tracked scenario coverage matrix only. Generated runs, QA evidence, screenshots, dashboard exports, package bundles, temp servers, local browser profiles, target outputs, and tool state remain ignored unless explicitly fixture-scoped.

scenarios.expected: game start loads a local source fixture through existing runtime probe evidence
player movement changes deterministic world state and input evidence
objective flags for key, gate, and exit update in evidence read models
hazard or enemy/NPC behavior is represented as deterministic state evidence, not arbitrary executable scripting
level completion reaches the exit trigger with a passing scenario verdict
lose/restart coverage preserves reset or checkpoint evidence for repeatable local reruns
HUD state exposes key, gate, exit, hazard, and restart readiness through read-only surfaces
runtime probe compatibility remains available for local scenario evidence
QA scenario pass evidence is local generated state linked to fixture-scoped scenario definitions
local web export/package verification evidence is recorded without native, mobile, console, store, signing, publish, or deploy authority
Studio walkthrough rendering remains read-only or draft-only and does not expose trusted browser writes
plugin descriptor validation uses inert metadata only with no executable plugin runtime
evidence bundle existence is linked from source-like fixtures or ignored generated run roots
broken objective must fail closed with a diagnostic before pass verdict promotion
scenarios.diagnostic: Fix the missing key/gate/exit evidence link, then rerun the deterministic scenario before review.

scenarios.expected: missing asset must block package or scenario acceptance with an asset diagnostic
scenarios.diagnostic: Provide the declared asset manifest entry or restore the referenced source asset before accepting evidence.

scenarios.expected: missing runtime probe must fail closed before runtime compatibility is claimed
scenarios.diagnostic: Restore the runtime probe global and required methods, then rerun probe compatibility evidence.

scenarios.expected: invalid level metadata must block scenario acceptance with a metadata diagnostic
scenarios.diagnostic: Fix level metadata, declared scene ids, or asset references before scenario evidence can pass.

scenarios.expected: broken export must block local package evidence with an export diagnostic
scenarios.diagnostic: Review the export profile and generated-state policy before rerunning local package verification.

scenarios.expected: invalid plugin descriptor must reject registry evidence without executable fallback
scenarios.diagnostic: Fix descriptor metadata and allowed extension points; do not execute plugin code to recover.

scenarios.expected: unclassified QA failure must block closure with a diagnostic and journal/evidence classification
scenarios.diagnostic: Classify the QA failure and link evidence before accepting or reviewing a fix.

scenarios.expected: incomplete evidence bundle must fail closed before demo regression closure
scenarios.diagnostic: Provide scenario, runtime probe, QA, review, export, Studio, and plugin evidence links before closure.

scenarios.expected: direct source apply attempt must reject unreviewed trusted writes and require review-gated Safe Source Apply
scenarios.diagnostic: Reject direct source mutation, require independent review, and use Safe Source Apply transaction evidence.

scenarios.expected: publish/deploy attempt must block with no publish, no deploy, no sign, and no upload authority
scenarios.diagnostic: Reject publish or deploy target and keep evidence limited to local web package verification.
